description_long: This is a rustic wooden tankard or mug, constructed from vertical wooden staves bound together by two wide, dark metal bands with visible rivets. The wood has a rich, medium-brown color with visible grain and knots, giving it a hand-crafted, medieval appearance. A large, ornate metal handle is attached to one side, featuring a curled end for easy gripping. The top is open, revealing the interior, and the base is flat, allowing it to stand upright on surfaces. The metal bands and handle have a slightly weathered, matte finish, suggesting durability and frequent use. There are no visible labels, markings, or decorative engravings on the exterior.
description: A rustic wooden tankard with metal bands and a large curled metal handle, featuring a hand-crafted, medieval look.
description_view_0: The tankard is shown from a three-quarter angle, highlighting the wooden staves, metal bands, and the ornate curled handle.
description_view_1: The tankard is viewed directly from the back, showing the full length of the metal handle and the symmetry of the metal bands.
description_view_2: The tankard is seen from the opposite side, displaying the handle's attachment and the uninterrupted wooden staves.
description_view_3: The tankard is viewed from the front, showing the seamless wooden staves and metal bands without the handle in view.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops around top and bottom
